root_text.an10.173:1.3: Adhammañca viditvā dhammañca, anatthañca viditvā atthañca yathā dhammo yathā attho tathā paṭipajjitabbaṁ.
root_text.an10.173:2.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, adhammo, katamo ca dhammo;
root_text.an10.173:2.2: katamo ca anattho, katamo ca attho?
root_text.an10.173:2.5: ye ca pāṇātipātapaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti, ayaṁ anattho;
root_text.an10.173:2.6: pāṇātipātā veramaṇipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti, ayaṁ attho.
root_text.an10.173:4.3: ye ca micchādiṭṭhipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti, ayaṁ anattho;
root_text.an10.173:4.4: sammādiṭṭhipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti, ayaṁ attho.
root_text.an10.173:5.3: Adhammañca viditvā dhammañca, anatthañca viditvā atthañca yathā dhammo yathā attho tathā paṭipajjitabban’ti,
root_text.an10.173:5.4: iti yaṁ taṁ vuttaṁ, idametaṁ paṭicca vuttan”ti.

translation_text.an10.173:1.1: “Mendicants, you should know bad principles and good principles.
translation_text.an10.173:1.2: And you should know bad results and good results.
translation_text.an10.173:1.3: Knowing these things, your practice should follow the good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.173:2.1: So what are bad principles? What are good principles? What are bad results? And what are good results?
translation_text.an10.173:2.3: Killing living creatures is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:2.4: Not killing living creatures is a good principle.
translation_text.an10.173:2.5: And the many bad, unskillful qualities produced by killing living creatures are bad results.
translation_text.an10.173:2.6: And the many skillful qualities fully developed because of not killing living creatures are good results.
translation_text.an10.173:3.2: Not stealing is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:3.3: Sexual misconduct is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:3.4: Avoiding sexual misconduct is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:3.6: Not lying is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:3.7: Divisive speech is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:3.8: Avoiding divisive speech is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:3.9: Harsh speech is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:3.10: Avoiding harsh speech is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:3.11: Talking nonsense is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:3.12: Avoiding talking nonsense is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:3.15: Ill will is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:3.16: Good will is a good principle. …
translation_text.an10.173:4.1: Wrong view is a bad principle.
translation_text.an10.173:4.2: Right view is a good principle.
translation_text.an10.173:4.3: And the many bad, unskillful qualities produced by wrong view are bad results.
translation_text.an10.173:4.4: And the many skillful qualities fully developed because of right view are good results.
translation_text.an10.173:5.1: ‘You should know bad principles and good principles.
translation_text.an10.173:5.2: And you should know bad results and good results.
translation_text.an10.173:5.3: Knowing these things, your practice should follow the good principles with good results.’
translation_text.an10.173:5.4: That’s what I said, and this is why I said it.”
